text:
A woman has been praised for her "genius" dating app hack, which has apparently led to her matching with an Olympic gold medallist.

Sofia, known onTikTokas @sofiaelizabethshackup, revealed how she tweaked her Hinge settings to the Olympic Village and ended up chatting with a victor from the US.

In her video, she gushed: "Whoever said to change your location to the 'Olympic Village' currently in Paris to match with an Olympian, I just want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for adding to the 'lore' that I will tell my future children about."

She claimed to have "instantly kicked it off" with the athlete, adding while failing to contain her laughter: "We get to talking and honestly, I could feel the chemistry and the future gold medal in my hands.

"When it was their time to shine in their sport, they didn't just shine, they won. They won the first gold medal for the United States of America - that's my match baby, that's my match."

:People gobsmacked to learn what .com stands for after 39 years

:'I took revenge on my neighbours who keep using my driveway - it made it worse'

:Olympic surfer rescued from drowning by brave lifeguards during dangerous storm

Despite not having spoken since, Sofia remains proud of her dating strategy. She explained that she simply adjusted her Hinge location settings to Saint-Ouen, Paris, where the Olympic Village is located.

There were some pitfalls though – as Sofia added: "Here comes the part that you know - swiping. You do kind of have to be hardcore on this if you truly do want an Olympian. I feel like the algorithm eventually picks up that you only want Olympians after saying no to everyone else.

"Then it becomes super easy. And if all goes well, flights to Paris are really cheap right now - for only $300 you can be with your match and see their cardboard bed in person."

Social media users were amused by her app trickery with comments flying in. One user applauded: "I love women - we are so resourceful."

We use your sign-up to provide content in ways you've consented to and to improve our understanding of you. This may include adverts from us and 3rd parties based on our understanding. You can unsubscribe at any time. Read ourPrivacy Policy

While another added their approval: "This is free game" Thanks sis. " A further comment came from a user who experienced immediate success: "Girl! I'm here just to say thank you.

"The first guy to show up when I changed my location was an athlete - not to mention French guys are just so cute. " Another chimed in with praise: "Doing the Lord's work."

title: Woman sets Hinge location as Olympic Village – see results | Weird | News | Express.co.uk
author: Paige Freshwater
description: A woman has been branded a 'genius' after she changed her Hinge location to the Olympic Village and matched with a gold-medal athlete - and she even shared her 'hack' on TikTok
